paper.title_en: Interplanetary scintillation-informed heliospheric modelling for the MeerKAT Pulsar Timing Array 4.5 yr dataset
paper.abstract_en: Heliospheric density variations impart delays on pulse times of arrivals from millisecond pulsars. Improper modelling of these variations may affect gravitational wave detection and characterisation by pulsar timing arrays (PTAs). Currently, PTAs typically employ a time-varying, spherically symmetric heliosphere model, which does not capture the full spatial and temporal complexity of the heliosphere. Instead, we investigate whether a three-dimensional, time-dependent model of the inner heliosphere from interplanetary scintillation (IPS) measurements - the IPS-UCSD model - can be employed to mitigate the solar wind in PTA analyses. We applied the IPS-UCSD model to the MeerKAT PTA 4.5-year dataset to assess whether it could correct for heliospheric density variations, and the impact on GW sensitivity compared to a spherically-symmetric model. We find that the model does not accurately correct for heliosphere-induced timing distortions, leading to bias in recovered GW parameters. Using simulations, we show that the spherically symmetric heliosphere model also fails to fully capture heliospheric density variations like those in the IPS-UCSD model. However, if interstellar dispersion measure (DM) variations are also modelled, then the heliospheric model errors are partially absorbed by DM variations, reducing contamination of the GW signal. Therefore we find that a time-varying spherically symmetric model is sufficient to mitigate the effect of heliospheric time delays on recovered GW results at typical PTA radio frequencies, provided other signal components are also modelled. We propose that the most precisely timed pulsars may be used to improve data-driven heliospheric density models in the future.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究了利用行星际闪烁模型改进脉冲星计时阵列的太阳风修正，对引力波探测有直接意义，方法系统，结论明确。
decision.title_zh: 用于MeerKAT脉冲星计时阵列4.5年数据集的行星际闪烁引导的日球层建模
decision.abstract_zh: 日球层密度变化会在毫秒脉冲星的脉冲到达时间上引入延迟。对这些变化的不当建模可能会影响脉冲星计时阵列（PTAs）对引力波的探测和表征。目前，PTAs通常采用时变、球对称的日球层模型，该模型无法捕捉日球层完整的空间和时间复杂性。相反，我们研究了是否可以采用来自行星际闪烁（IPS）测量的三维、时间依赖的内日球层模型——IPS-UCSD模型——来缓解PTA分析中的太阳风影响。我们将IPS-UCSD模型应用于MeerKAT PTA 4.5年数据集，以评估它是否能纠正日球层密度变化，以及相比球对称模型对引力波灵敏度的影响。我们发现该模型不能准确校正日球层引起的计时畸变，导致恢复的引力波参数存在偏差。通过模拟，我们表明球对称日球层模型也无法完全捕捉像IPS-UCSD模型中的日球层密度变化。然而，如果星际色散量（DM）变化也被建模，那么日球层模型误差会被DM变化部分吸收，从而减少对引力波信号的污染。因此，我们发现，时变球对称模型足以缓解日球层时间延迟对恢复的引力波结果的影响（在典型的PTA射电频率下），前提是其他信号成分也被建模。我们提出，未来可以利用计时最精确的脉冲星来改进数据驱动的日球层密度模型。
